# Exodus 25

## Verses (40)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | And the Lord said to Moses, | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Say to the children of Israel that they are to make me an offering; from every man who has the impulse in his heart take an offering for me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | And this is the offering you are to take from them: gold and silver and brass; | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | And blue and purple and red, and the best linen, and goats' hair; | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | And sheepskins coloured red, and leather, and hard wood; | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Oil for the light, spices for the sweet-smelling oil, sweet perfumes for burning; | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | Beryls and stones of value to be put on the ephod and on the priest's bag. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | And let them make me a holy place, so that I may be ever present among them. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Make the House and everything in it from the designs which I will give you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | And they are to make an ark of hard wood; two and a half cubits long, and a cubit and a half wide and high. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | It is to be plated inside and out with the best gold, with an edge of gold all round it | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | And make four rings of gold for it, to be fixed on its four feet, two rings on one side of it and two on the other. | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | And make rods of the same wood, plating them with gold. | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | And put the rods through the rings at the sides of the ark, for lifting it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | The rods are to be kept in the rings, and never taken out. | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | Inside the ark you are to put the record which I will give you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | And you are to make a cover of the best gold, two and a half cubits long and a cubit and a half wide. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | And at the two ends of the cover you are to make two winged ones of hammered gold, | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | One at one end and one at the other; the winged ones are to be part of the cover. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | And their wings are to be outstretched over the cover, and the winged ones are to be opposite one another, facing the cover. | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | And put the cover over the ark, and in the ark the record which I will give you. | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | And there, between the two winged ones on the cover of the ark, I will come to you, face to face, and make clear to you all the orders I have to give you for the children of Israel. | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | And you are to make a table of the same wood, two cubits long, a cubit wide and a cubit and a half high, | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | Plated with the best gold, with a gold edge all round it; | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | And make a frame all round it, as wide as a man's hand, with a gold edge to the frame. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | And make four gold rings and put them at the four angles, on the four feet of the table; | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
| [27](BBE.md#v27) | The rings are to be fixed under the frame to take the rods with which the table is to be lifted. | [WEB](WEB.md#v27) · [KJV](KJV.md#v27) · [ASV](ASV.md#v27) |
| [28](BBE.md#v28) | Make rods of the same wood, plated with gold, for lifting the table. | [WEB](WEB.md#v28) · [KJV](KJV.md#v28) · [ASV](ASV.md#v28) |
| [29](BBE.md#v29) | And make the table-vessels, the spoons and the cups and the basins for liquids, all of the best gold. | [WEB](WEB.md#v29) · [KJV](KJV.md#v29) · [ASV](ASV.md#v29) |
| [30](BBE.md#v30) | And on the table at all times you are to keep my holy bread. | [WEB](WEB.md#v30) · [KJV](KJV.md#v30) · [ASV](ASV.md#v30) |
| [31](BBE.md#v31) | And you are to make a support for lights, of the best gold; its base and its pillar are to be of hammered gold; its cups, its buds, and its flowers are to be made of the same metal. | [WEB](WEB.md#v31) · [KJV](KJV.md#v31) · [ASV](ASV.md#v31) |
| [32](BBE.md#v32) | It is to have six branches coming out from its sides; three branches from one side and three from the other. | [WEB](WEB.md#v32) · [KJV](KJV.md#v32) · [ASV](ASV.md#v32) |
| [33](BBE.md#v33) | Every branch having three cups made like almond flowers, every cup with a bud and a flower, on all the branches. | [WEB](WEB.md#v33) · [KJV](KJV.md#v33) · [ASV](ASV.md#v33) |
| [34](BBE.md#v34) | And on the pillar, four cups like almond flowers, every one with its bud and its flower: | [WEB](WEB.md#v34) · [KJV](KJV.md#v34) · [ASV](ASV.md#v34) |
| [35](BBE.md#v35) | And under every two branches a bud, made with the branch, for all the six branches of it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v35) · [KJV](KJV.md#v35) · [ASV](ASV.md#v35) |
| [36](BBE.md#v36) | The buds and the branches are to be made of the same metal; all together one complete work of hammered gold. | [WEB](WEB.md#v36) · [KJV](KJV.md#v36) · [ASV](ASV.md#v36) |
| [37](BBE.md#v37) | Then you are to make its seven vessels for the lights, putting them in their place so that they give light in front of it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v37) · [KJV](KJV.md#v37) · [ASV](ASV.md#v37) |
| [38](BBE.md#v38) | And the instruments and trays for use with it are all to be of the best gold. | [WEB](WEB.md#v38) · [KJV](KJV.md#v38) · [ASV](ASV.md#v38) |
| [39](BBE.md#v39) | A talent of gold will be needed for it, with all these vessels. | [WEB](WEB.md#v39) · [KJV](KJV.md#v39) · [ASV](ASV.md#v39) |
| [40](BBE.md#v40) | And see that you make them from the design which you saw on the mountain. | [WEB](WEB.md#v40) · [KJV](KJV.md#v40) · [ASV](ASV.md#v40) |
